The list Of delegates from this
city 10 the meeting of the State
Federation Of Labor continues to
grow. e. A. Cooney and Joseph
Duber will represent the steam en-
gineers, James Stevenson the team
owners union and Wallace
Mitchell the cigar makers.


The Spokane delegation will be
many times the largest ever sent
and Is a practical demonstration of
the increasing interest labor men
are &king In political conditions
ana eheir personal welfare in the
enactment of laws having the in
terests of the common people in
view.


The state federation Is the only
labor organization in the state that
looks after the legislative end Of
the labor problem,


1t has affiliated with II the
farmers grange and the clergy OF
various denominations.
